query:
-- 今日任务状态统计
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count
FROM openclaw_tasks
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY status;

-- 今日失败任务详情
SELECT t.id, t.errorMsg, LEFT(t.message, 100) as msg, t.createdAt, u.username
FROM openclaw_tasks t
LEFT JOIN users u ON t.userId = u.id
WHERE t.status = 'failed' AND t.createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY t.createdAt DESC;

-- 卡在 processing 超过30分钟的任务
SELECT t.id, LEFT(t.message, 80) as msg, t.createdAt, u.username
FROM openclaw_tasks t
LEFT JOIN users u ON t.userId = u.id
WHERE t.status = 'processing' 
  AND t.createdAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE)
ORDER BY t.createdAt DESC;

WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY status;

-- 今日失败任务详情
SELECT t.id, t.errorMsg, LEFT(t.message, 100) as msg, t.createdAt, u.username
FROM openclaw_tasks t
LEFT JOIN users u ON t.userId = u.id
WHERE t.status = 'failed' AND t.createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY t.createdAt DESC;

-- 卡在 processing 超过30分钟的任务
SELECT t.id, LEFT(t.message, 80) as msg, t.createdAt, u.username
FROM openclaw_tasks t
LEFT JOIN users u ON t.userId = u.id
WHERE t.status = 'processing' 
  AND t.createdAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE)
ORDER BY t.createdAt DESC;
